content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://jamanetwork.com/journals/jamanetworkopen/fullarticle/2787246", "source_title": "Intermittent Fasting and Obesity-Related Health Outcomes", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "This umbrella review reported following the 2020 Preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews and Meta-analyses (PRISMA) reporting guide...", "direct_quote": "This umbrella review reported following the 2020 Preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews and Meta-analyses (PRISMA) reporting guideline.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Search Strategy and Eligibility Criteria We searched PubMed, EMBASE, and Cochrane database of systematic reviews from inception to January 1...", "direct_quote": "Search Strategy and Eligibility Criteria We searched PubMed, EMBASE, and Cochrane database of systematic reviews from inception to January 12, 2021, to identify meta-analyses of RCTs (eTable 1 in the Supplement).", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "To be included, the studies met the following criteria: meta-analyses of RCTs investigating associations of IF with obesity-related health o...", "direct_quote": "To be included, the studies met the following criteria: meta-analyses of RCTs investigating associations of IF with obesity-related health outcomes among adults with or without any medical conditions in comparison with any comparators including conti", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
